steps.action: Run test: should render dashboard container with .dashboard class
steps.expected: Test passes — .dashboard wrapper div exists
steps.observed: Test passed. container.querySelector('.dashboard') found in document.

assertions.title: Loads config from SettingsManager, falls back to default

steps.action: Run test: should load config from SettingsManager and use it
steps.expected: Test passes — getDashboardConfig called
steps.observed: Test passed. SettingsManager.getDashboardConfigtoHaveBeenCalled().

steps.action: Run test: should fall back to default config when SettingsManager returns null
steps.expected: Test passes — saveDashboardConfig called with default when null
steps.observed: Test passed. saveDashboardConfig called; saved config has sections array with all enabled.

steps.action: Run test: should not render sections with enabled: false
steps.expected: Test passes — disabled sections not in DOM
steps.observed: Test passed. Enabled sections (study-streak, overall-progress, smart-recommendations) found. Disabled sections (learning-goals, modules-needing-review, upcoming-milestones, performance-charts) not found.

steps.action: Run test: should render sections sorted by config order
steps.expected: Test passes — DOM order matches sorted config order
steps.observed: Test passed. Config with performance-charts order=1, overall-progress order=2, study-streak order=3 rendered performance-charts first (sections[0]).

assertions.title: Renders paired sections in grid-pair containers

steps.action: Run test: should render paired sections (study-streak + learning-goals) in grid-pair container
steps.expected: Test passes — .dashboard-grid-pair wraps both sections
steps.observed: Test passed. gridPair found with both section-study-streak and section-learning-goals inside.

steps.action: Run test: should render upcoming-milestones + smart-recommendations as a grid pair
steps.expected: Test passes — .dashboard-grid-pair wraps both sections
steps.observed: Test passed. gridPair found with both section-upcoming-milestones and section-smart-recommendations inside.

steps.action: Run test: should render unpaired section individually without grid-pair wrapper
steps.expected: Test passes — no .dashboard-grid-pair, section renders directly
steps.observed: Test passed. No grid-pair found; overall-progress section rendered individually.

steps.action: Run test: should render unpaired section when its pair is disabled
steps.expected: Test passes — study-streak renders solo when learning-goals disabled
steps.observed: Test passed. study-streak in DOM, no grid-pair present.

assertions.title: Initializes ActivityTracker and calculates progress on mount

steps.action: Run test: should initialize ActivityTracker and calculate progress on mount
steps.expected: Test passes — both utilities called with modules
steps.observed: Test passed. ActivityTracker.initializeTracking called with modules; ProgressTracker.getOverallProgress called with modules.

steps.action: Run test: should pass correct stats from getModuleStatistics to OverallProgressSection
steps.expected: Test passes — getModuleStatistics called, stats rendered correctly
steps.observed: Test passed. getModuleStatistics called with modules; stats-value textContent matches customStats JSON.

steps.action: Run test: should get last watched module from ProgressTracker
steps.expected: Test passes — getLastWatchedModule called with modules
steps.observed: Test passed. ProgressTracker.getLastWatchedModule called with modules array.

steps.action: Run test: should navigate to last watched module when action is clicked
steps.expected: Test passes — onModuleSelect called with last watched module
steps.observed: Test passed. onModuleSelect called with lastWatchedModule.

steps.action: Run test: should navigate to first incomplete module when no last watched
steps.expected: Test passes — onModuleSelect called with first incomplete module
steps.observed: Test passed. onModuleSelect called with modules[0] (progress 0).

steps.action: Run test: should navigate to first module when all modules are complete
steps.expected: Test passes — onModuleSelect called with first module
steps.observed: Test passed. onModuleSelect called with modules[0] when all progress is 100.

steps.action: Run test: should limit modules needing review to 5
steps.expected: Test passes — at most 5 review modules rendered
steps.observed: Test passed. 8 modules needing review, but only 5 review-module-* elements rendered.

steps.action: Run test: should render without crashing when modules is empty array
steps.expected: Test passes — .dashboard container rendered
steps.observed: Test passed. container.querySelector('.dashboard') found.

steps.action: Run test: should render without crashing when modules is null
steps.expected: Test passes — .dashboard container rendered
steps.observed: Test passed. container.querySelector('.dashboard') found.

steps.action: Run test: should render without crashing when modules is undefined
steps.expected: Test passes — .dashboard container rendered
steps.observed: Test passed. container.querySelector('.dashboard') found.

steps.action: Run test: should render each enabled section exactly once
steps.expected: Test passes — each section testid appears at most once
steps.observed: Test passed. All 7 section testids appear exactly once (elements.length <= 1 for each).

steps.action: Run test: should not duplicate any section ID in rendered DOM
steps.expected: Test passes — all section data-testid values are unique
steps.observed: Test passed. testIds.length === uniqueIds.size confirmed.

summary: Tested 13 assertions (VAL-DASHBOARD-001 through VAL-DASHBOARD-013): all 13 passed. Dashboard.test.jsx contains 24 tests covering all assertions with multiple sub-tests for complex assertions (navigation logic, empty state handling, section uniqueness). Full test suite (426 tests across 19 suites) passes with no regressions.
